---
title: "Cohort 2024"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="border-left-color: #b01c2e;"}
PhD researchers who joined the Practice-Oriented AI CDT in the 2024 cohort.
:::

<style>
  .student-card {
    background: #ffffff;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 20px;
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
    transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .student-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    border-color: #b01c2e;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  }
  .student-img {
    width: 65px;
    height: 65px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
  }
  .student-supervisor {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    background: #f8fafc;
    padding: 10px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    margin-top: auto; /* Empurra o supervisor e o link para a base do card */
  }
  .student-link {
    color: #b01c2e;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    margin-top: 10px;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .student-link:hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
  }
</style>

::: {.grid}

<!-- Berenika Ewart-James -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.student-card}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
  <img class="student-img" src="images_2024/berenika_ewart_james.png" alt="Berenika Ewart-James">
  <h4 class="fw-bold m-0 fs-5" style="color: #1e293b;">Berenika Ewart-James</h4>
</div>

Berenika investigates how simulations can be used to personalise physical activity plans using minimal user data, targeting scalable and privacy-conscious health interventions.

::: {.student-supervisor .mt-3}
**Supervisor:** Prof. Raul Santos-Rodriguez  
*School of Engineering Mathematics and Technology*
:::
[View Personal Page →](https://berenika-ej.github.io/personal_page/){.student-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

<!-- Bezawit Tilaye -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.student-card}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
  <img class="student-img" src="images_2024/bezawit_lake_tilaye.png" alt="Bezawit Tilaye">
  <h4 class="fw-bold m-0 fs-5" style="color: #1e293b;">Bezawit Tilaye</h4>
</div>

Bezawit's work critically examines how fairness, accountability, and transparency are addressed in healthcare AI systems, with the goal of identifying practical gaps and improving ethical standards in medical AI applications.

::: {.student-supervisor .mt-3}
**Supervisor:** Dr. Telmo de Menezes e Silva Filho  
*School of Engineering Mathematics and Technology*
:::
<span style="color:#94a3b8; font-size:0.9rem; margin-top:10px; font-weight:600;">Profile coming soon</span>
:::
:::

<!-- David Fox -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.student-card}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
  <img class="student-img" src="images_2024/david_fox.png" alt="David Fox">
  <h4 class="fw-bold m-0 fs-5" style="color: #1e293b;">David Fox</h4>
</div>

David focuses on developing techniques that generate high-quality interpolated video frames while maintaining computational efficiency, with potential impact in media production and video streaming.

::: {.student-supervisor .mt-3}
**Supervisor:** Dr. Aaron Zhang  
*School of Computer Science*
:::
[View Personal Page →](https://davidfox-66.github.io/personal_page/){.student-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

<!-- Jack Woodcock -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.student-card}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
  <img class="student-img" src="images_2024/jack_woodcock.png" alt="Jack Woodcock">
  <h4 class="fw-bold m-0 fs-5" style="color: #1e293b;">Jack Woodcock</h4>
</div>

Jack evaluates how effectively ML-based climate models capture extreme weather events, examining the models’ understanding of the underlying physics to offer insights into their predictive capabilities and limitations for real-world climate forecasting.

::: {.student-supervisor .mt-3}
**Supervisor:** Dr. Peter Watson  
*School of Geographical Sciences*
:::
[View Personal Page →](https://proai-jack.github.io/personal_page/){.student-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

<!-- Jake Chastney -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.student-card}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
  <img class="student-img" src="images_2024/jake_chastney.png" alt="Jake Chastney">
  <h4 class="fw-bold m-0 fs-5" style="color: #1e293b;">Jake Chastney</h4>
</div>

Jake is building a reasoning pipeline that combines neural and symbolic methods over knowledge graphs, with mechanisms for empirical rule validation and probabilistic inference, aimed at complex decision-making tasks.

::: {.student-supervisor .mt-3}
**Supervisor:** Dr. James Cussens  
*School of Computer Science*
:::
[View Personal Page →](https://jakechast.github.io/personal_page/){.student-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

<!-- James Brock -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.student-card}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
  <img class="student-img" src="images_2024/james_brock.png" alt="James Brock">
  <h4 class="fw-bold m-0 fs-5" style="color: #1e293b;">James Brock</h4>
</div>

James investigates how to improve forest change analysis for practitioners through vision foundation models and interactive agents, aiming to enhance the utility, accuracy, and usability of forest monitoring tools for conservation efforts.

::: {.student-supervisor .mt-3}
**Supervisor:** Dr. Nantheera Anantrasirichai
*School of Computer Science*
:::
[View Personal Page →](https://jamesbrockuob.github.io/personal_page/){.student-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

<!-- Jono Vincent -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.student-card}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
  <img class="student-img" src="images_2024/jono_vincent.png" alt="Jono Vincent">
  <h4 class="fw-bold m-0 fs-5" style="color: #1e293b;">Jono Vincent</h4>
</div>

Jono explores how adversarial strategies develop in the game of Go, aiming to classify and analyse these behaviours. The project contributes to improving the robustness and interpretability of AI in strategic games.

::: {.student-supervisor .mt-3}
**Supervisor:** Dr. Telmo de Menezes e Silva Filho  
*School of Engineering Mathematics and Technology*
:::
[View Personal Page →](https://jonovincent-proai.github.io/personal_page/){.student-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

<!-- Moses Guran -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.student-card}
<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
  <img class="student-img" src="images_2024/moses_guran.png" alt="Moses Guran">
  <h4 class="fw-bold m-0 fs-5" style="color: #1e293b;">Moses Guran</h4>
</div>

Moses introduces a novel video compression method inspired by neural spiking behaviour. The project aims to reduce data rates while preserving quality, opening new directions in biologically inspired video coding.

::: {.student-supervisor .mt-3}
**Supervisor:** Dr. Aaron Zhang  
*School of Computer Science*
:::
[View Personal Page →](https://moiseguran13.github.io/personal_page/){.student-link target="_blank"}
:::
:::

:::
